case_title: WATSON, JAMES M. vs. BARR, TERENCE IND/DBA SAN FRANCISCO MOTORWERKS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATSON, JAMES M. AS TO DEFENDANT BARR, TERENCE IND/DBA SAN FRANCISCO MOTORWERKS
